description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa with a soft, tan-brown fabric exterior and a relaxed, overstuffed appearance. The seat is deep and wide, with a single, loose seat cushion that appears plush and inviting. Four loose, medium-sized gray throw pillows are arranged along the backrest, providing both comfort and a subtle color contrast. The armrests are high, thick, and padded, matching the backrest in height and creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The sofa's base is fully skirted, concealing any legs or supports, and the upholstery has a matte, slightly textured finish. The overall design is casual and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, lounges, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern, overstuffed tan sofa with high, padded armrests and four loose gray pillows, featuring a deep seat and a fully skirted base. The upholstery is matte and slightly textured, giving it a cozy, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep seat, four gray pillows, and high, padded armrests enclosing the seating area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the side profile of the sofa, with a glimpse of the pillows inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered backrest and the skirted base, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the padded armrest and the arrangement of pillows within the sofa.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One large, loose seat cushion and four medium-sized, loose back cushions arranged in a single row; all cushions are uniform in size and shape, with no visible attachment.
attribute_armrest_style: High, thick, and fully padded armrests that are level with the backrest, featuring a straight, boxy profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base is fully skirted, suggesting hidden or recessed supports beneath the fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest matching the armrest height, with no segmentation or tufting, and loose cushions providing support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid tan color with a matte, slightly textured fabric; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
